IGUI_SafeZone_NoteText: If you're reading this, you're still alive. There is a safe zone to the northwest, near the old military base. Walls, supplies, and people who still give a damn. Coordinates: %1, %2. Don't wait - fewer chances after dark.
IGUI_StarterKit_AlreadyReceived: You already received the starter kit
IGUI_SZR_Msg1: Attention all survivors. Safe zone is operational. Coordinates: 13050, 9750.
IGUI_SZR_Msg2: Perimeter secured. Supply crates available at the safe zone.
IGUI_SZR_Msg3: All survivors - head northwest toward the old military base. Walls are holding.
IGUI_SZR_Msg4: This is SafeZone broadcast. We have shelter, supplies, and defenses. You are not alone.
IGUI_SZR_Msg5: Patrol reports no breach. Safe zone remains secure. Stay on this frequency for updates.
IGUI_SZ_InfGen_AdminOnly: Only admins can take infinite generators.
